description:
You are acting as the site administrator for a small web service.  
A data dump of the current user table has been placed at  

    /home/user/data/user_accounts.csv  

The file is **already present** and has the exact five-line content shown below
(including the header on the first line and using the *literal* comma character
as the field separator).

username,email,role  
alice,alice@example.com,editor  
bob,bob@example.com,admin  
carol,carol@example.com,viewer  
dave,dave@example.com,editor  

Your job is to create two new helper files, both in the same directory
(/home/user/data):

1. /home/user/data/usernames.txt  
   • One username per line, in the original order found in
     user_accounts.csv.  
   • No extra blank lines, spaces, or header. The file must look **exactly** like:

alice  
bob  
carol  
dave  

2. /home/user/data/new_userlist.csv  
   • Two columns only: role (first) and username (second).  
   • Comma-separated, no header line, same row order as in the source file.  
   • The file must look **exactly** like:

editor,alice  
admin,bob  
viewer,carol  
editor,dave  

Constraints & tips (not visible to the automated checker):
• You should accomplish everything with a *maximum* of three standard
  command-line utilities (e.g. cut, paste, awk, etc.).  
• Do **not** hard-code the lines; extract them from the existing CSV file.  
• Make sure both output files are placed in /home/user/data and are readable
  by the current unprivileged user.

When you are finished you can cat the two generated files to confirm their
contents, but the automated test will verify:

• that /home/user/data/usernames.txt exists **and** matches the exact
  four-line content shown above;  
• that /home/user/data/new_userlist.csv exists **and** matches the exact
  four-line, two-column CSV content shown above;  
• that no header line is present in either new file.

No additional changes are required.
truth:
Initial files present before the task begins:
1. /home/user/data/user_accounts.csv  
   Contents (5 lines, LF line endings):
username,email,role
alice,alice@example.com,editor
bob,bob@example.com,admin
carol,carol@example.com,viewer
dave,dave@example.com,editor

Files that **must** exist after successful task completion:

1. /home/user/data/usernames.txt  
   EXACT contents (4 lines, LF line endings, no trailing blank line):
alice
bob
carol
dave

2. /home/user/data/new_userlist.csv  
   EXACT contents (4 lines, LF line endings, no trailing blank line):
editor,alice
admin,bob
viewer,carol
editor,dave
